requirement_topic.en: Grid-Connection and Project Acceptance for Bosnia EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 波斯尼亚EV充电桩并网与项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: 波斯尼亞EV充電樁併網與專案驗收

summary.en: Bosnia and Herzegovina charging stations intended for grid connection must still pass project and NOS BiH route acceptance. For public or semi-public charging, requirements can include station registration, metering and tariff data, grid interconnection drawings, protection and earthing assumptions, and commissioning records. Product certificates alone are not project acceptance in Bosnia.
summary.zh: 在波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那并网的充电站仍需通过项目和NOS BiH路径验收。面向公共或半公共充电时，要求可能包括站点登记、计量与资费数据、电网接入图纸、保护和接地假设、以及投运记录。单靠产品证书不能完成波斯尼亚项目验收。
summary.zht: 在波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那併網的充電站仍需通過專案和NOS BiH路徑驗收。面向公共或半公共充電時，要求可能包括站點登記、計量與資費資料、電網接入圖紙、保護和接地假設，以及投運記錄。單靠產品證書不能完成波斯尼亞專案驗收。

standards_or_laws: Bosnia and Herzegovina energy installation and charger project practices
DERK and NOS BiH grid operator acceptance route
Distribution-company interconnection and local installation requirements

summary.en: China GB/T 18487.1 and related station documentation support technical comparison for equipment readiness. However, Chinese project paperwork does not establish Bosnia station registration, DERK governance alignment, or NOS BiH acceptance by itself.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 18487.1 及相关站点文件可用于设备就绪程度的技术对比，但不能单独建立波斯尼亚站点登记、DERK治理对接或NOS BiH验收。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 18487.1及相關站點文件可用於設備就緒程度的技術對比，但不能單獨建立波斯尼亞站點登記、DERK治理對接或NOS BiH驗收。

gap.en: Prepare Bosnia-ready station documents for each site: electrical single-line diagrams, interconnection permission, metering and tariff references, station owner/operator identification, commissioning protocol, and operator or fleet integration evidence aligned to DERK and NOS BiH expectations.
gap.zh: 为每个站点准备波斯尼亚就绪材料：电气单线图、并网许可、计量和资费参考、站点业主/运营者身份、调试协议、以及与DERK和NOS BiH要求一致的运营或车队集成证据。
gap.zht: 為每個站點準備波斯尼亞就緒資料：電氣單線圖、併網許可、計量和資費參考、站點業主/營運者身份、調試協議，以及與DERK和NOS BiH要求一致的營運或車隊整合證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where project grid interconnection and acceptance is required for the Bosnia site and public or fleet operation
mandatory_status.cn: China project files do not establish Bosnia grid-connection or station registration rights

source.publisher: Independent System Operator of Bosnia and Herzegovina (NOS BiH)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A CE or GB/T charger file alone is insufficient for Bosnia grid acceptance. Confirm station registration, metering, and commissioning steps with the local operator and DERK for each location.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅有CE或GB/T充电桩文件不足以完成波斯尼亚并网验收。应对每个站点与当地运营方和DERK确认站点登记、计量和调试步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅有CE或GB/T充電樁文件不足以完成波斯尼亞併網驗收。應對每個站點與當地營運方和DERK確認站點登記、計量和調試步驟。
